name: Penpot MCP Server
what_it_does: Penpot MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Penpot — the open-source design and prototyping tool — creating and modifying design elements, managing design components, accessing design tokens, and integrating Penpot's design capabilities into agent-driven UI design and development workflows.
use_cases: Creating and modifying UI design elements from design automation agents
Managing Penpot design components and libraries from design system agents
Extracting design tokens and styles from design-to-code agents
Generating design variations from AI-powered design agents
Integrating design workflows with development from design-dev agents
Automating repetitive design tasks from productivity agents
not_for: Figma users (use Figma MCP instead — different platform)
Teams needing desktop-native design tools (Penpot is web-based)
Complex prototyping with advanced Penpot features (limited MCP coverage)
best_when: A team using Penpot for open-source design tooling needs AI-assisted design automation — creating elements, managing components, and extracting design tokens.
avoid_when: Your team uses Figma — use the Figma MCP instead. Penpot is the open-source Figma alternative.

auth.notes: Penpot API token required. Generate from Penpot account settings. Works with both Penpot cloud and self-hosted instances.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Penpot is completely free and open source
pricing.paid_tiers: Penpot Enterprise for self-hosted with SLA
pricing.notes: Penpot is free open source. MCP server is free open source. No usage costs beyond self-hosting if applicable.

performance.rate_limits: Penpot API rate limits — see documentation

known_agent_gotchas: Penpot API is less mature than Figma API — fewer documented endpoints
Community MCP from montevive — not official Penpot integration
Design element IDs required for modifications — agents must track IDs
Works with both cloud and self-hosted — configure endpoint URL accordingly
Penpot API may have breaking changes as platform evolves
Design file and project structure knowledge required for effective use
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Penpot API token required. Community MCP. Design data in Penpot — handle per team's IP policies. GDPR applies for EU-hosted instances.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API token auth. Community MCP. Design data privacy. GDPR applicable.
